questionHtml:
Which 0.01 mol dm–3 aqueous solution has the highest pH?

A.  HCl

B.  H2SO4

C.  NaOH

D.  NH3

meta.title: Which 0.01 mol dm–3 aqueous solution has the highest pH? A. HCl B. H2SO4 C. NaOH D. NH3
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.1.6—Strong and weak acids and bases differ in the extent of ionization. Recognize that acid–base equilibria lie in the direction of the weaker conjugate. and are strong acids, and group 1 hydroxides are strong bases.
